STUDIO U1

Capturing Fleeting Raw Emotions

Award-winning cinematography and portraiture. We freeze raw human bonds and grand architectures with cinematic lens systems.

OUR CAPABILITIES

Professional Production Services

Wedding & Candid

Capturing split-second laughs and tearful glances with prime portrait lenses and natural lighting.

Cinematography

10-bit log files, advanced gimbal stabilization runs, and custom lut color-grading pipelines.

Aerial Drone Runs

Capturing sweeping lawn layouts, ocean backdrops, and birds-eye landscape videos.

Newborn & Family

Comfortable temperature-controlled studio spaces to capture secure initial milestones.

Outdoor Shoots

Curating natural forest coordinates and coastal paths for pre-wedding portfolio shoots.

Studio Portfolios

Bespoke corporate headshots, glamour photography, and commercial product catalogs.
